CONFIDENTIAL DEAL MEMO

Project Codename: Operation Quantum Leap

To: Ms. Clara Tan, Head of Corporate Strategy  
From: Mr. Alex Lim, Mergers & Acquisitions Lead  
Date: October 12, 2023  

We are in the final stages of negotiating the acquisition of StellarTech Pte Ltd (UEN: 201312345D) under Project Quantum Leap. The target acquisition price is projected to be SGD 45,000,000. This strategic move aims to enhance our technological capabilities in the AI sector.

The primary contact from StellarTech is Dr. Samuel Ong, reachable at +65 9123 4567 and samuel.ong@stellartech.sg. For internal communications, please direct correspondence to alex.lim@ourcompany.sg.

Due diligence is ongoing, and we anticipate signing the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) by November 15, 2023. Please ensure all compliance checks, especially concerning data privacy regulations, are completed by the end of this month.

For any clarifications, please contact me directly at +65 9876 5432. This memo contains sensitive information; handle it in accordance with our internal security protocols.

NRIC of lead negotiator: S8765432B

End of Memo.
